I'm trying to make some teams to try D-Tide for the first time before it ends today, wondering if these are okay teams before I spam exp potions all over them.
I don't think I have enough exp potions to level everyone to 60 so it would be good if my teams aren't too terrible 😅
what team is good to build here, im new.

These teams should be ok for four alert 1s + an alert 4 (maybe 3 if not confident)

Team 1 ok, Pontos carries
Team 2: Aurita Saya Murphy Goliath
Team 3: Clementine + Horla + Thais should be enough wheelchairs for Uvhash 
Team 4 ok
Team 5 borrow whale Mouchette

Get your carries (Aurita, Uvhash) to lvl 40

1 point of Soulforge on everyone

Counter team can go wave 5, Pontos can go wave 2, Mouchette can go 1 or 3
Thanks!
if mouchette is on wave 3 you can do alert 5
team 1 2 3 should be able to do alert 2
for team 4 swap ogier with faros
and it can do alert 2 as well

took me 3 hours
but at least I know how to play better and hopefully it won't take so long next time. need to make less mistakes and learn to save more symphony for the burst turn

content: im a bit farther into the game, but i wanted to start to make more end game-ish teams, at story 7, wondering how i could make my Gelot team better (i like her and want her as my main dps)
currently using this but im not sure if im wasting potential of saya/salvador
For this team is xu or gdoll posse prefereable?
Xu
Which characters, wheels, and other things I might not know about would increase hand size cap?
Also how do you get 24 to go into manic state? I've read her abilities, but the only thing I found was that she starts off in depressed state during exploration start.
exalt
Thank you.
There's one hand size wheel per realm, basically. Three of them are keyflare, one of them is damage amp.
Tawil, Thais, GMurphy, and Castor's wheels, respectively
Some characters will incidentally increase hand size cap, but not for long, and there are very few sources of permanent increases.

Okay. Thank you. I will take a look at those. I really like Liz. Trying to figure out how to make that work. 24 could work with her, because she gets a +2 hand size limit when roused with an ultra. Still not sure of my other 2 slots.

Maybe with Wheel Unseen. I need to figure out a way to get enemies to attack me a lot while not outright killing me. I don't know if any characters can force enemies to make attacks or split their damage into multiple steps. Like turning a 100 hit into 50x2.
<:Wanda_proud:1468258146551333088>you called?
Ooh. Does Wanda have that? I haven't unlocked her yet.
Let me go read her stuff.
It's so very wanda
That's actually perfect, because I love her design too.
Okay, so 24, Liz, Wanda.
One more slot for either a Chaos or Ultra unit.
Is Dimension Shuttle when you trigger your extra turn?
Its when you put a card intro the ultra realm
First card you play each turn
Gotcha. A lot of chances then. I wonder if that makes it a 10 turn cycle deck? I need to figure out how to get Wanda though. Might need to wait until she reruns.
You have a low % chance of getting her from the standard ultra banner
ok from a meta perspective please don't get Wanda just to build this team😅
Yeah, I'm not making this team for meta. Just a fun team.
-# Or have the luck to get her 2 times from standard like ms lol
This may be funny haha because of what I'm doing, but I also advise against Wanda/Liz
I would actually suggest you play Xu
and including the fact that Castor is probably more likely to run than Wanda to begin with, you'll also want his wheel specifically anyway
but if you just want Wanda I get it I'm considering Wanda Xu Liz (keyflare unit)
Hell yeah! I'll have to see about it. I would like to find a team that I enjoy. Tentacle on hit was really fun. I might go back to it, but I think I need to experiment with all the units out there.
do you enjoy aesthetic or function more
Ideally more aesthetic. But sometimes I can sacrifice a little. I just really liked Liz and 24's designs.
you and I are the same
*We're going to suffer, you and I.*
That's okay. I'm used to suffering. Lol.
24 and Liz end up in a lot of high investment high reward comps. Liz is easier to get copies of, though -- if you like pulling for Ultra characters, you will eventually max out the copies for Liz.
With 24, you'll be lucky to get E3. Just how it is.
They don't play together, ultimately, but it will probably suit you well initially on account of the way their rouses work.
I actually have 24, Thais, Ghelot, and Tawil as my rate ups on Moonless Guide. I feel like I should pull more for them.

Wanda and 24 are what I call semilimited, since - as arc 1 units - they appear in the generic pool of units, but are very rare in that pool. You'll also really want a few more copies of each before you really feel more comfortable.
Thais and GHelot I'm a lot more familiar with <:YEETLOAF:721466396764012937>
Ooh. Do tell. I might use them.
Ghelot E0 (rerunning soon though I think?), Thais E2, 24 E1, and Tawil E2.
Conventional wisdom for GHelot is that although E3 increases the consistency, what she really needs are E2 and Thais E2
Doesn't even need Thais tbf
But a lot comfier
GHelot frequently runs with the posse you get from clearing chapter 7, so... enjoy that for a while. She has a rough matchup into the Chapter 5 boss.

Another problem is that GHelot honestly balls too hard for early game enemies -- she will frequently kill them with Crimson Shackles, preventing you from hitting with Bloodthirsty Flail, which is how she recovers health.

If you don't have Thais, you *will* need C7 posse. Your burst is limited by your access to that card, and while you do get multiple Crimson Shackles you can convert into Bloodthirsty Flails, your health management becomes very... difficult.
(or use Celeste<:Celeste_pray:1356053116260454534> )
Even with Celeste, converting a single Crimson Shackle costs you 27% of your current health
converting three of them will reliably leave you below half health if you're taking even incidental damage
considering that most trash mobs will rudely *die* before you get to heal back up with Flail... this can be unfortunately timed.
How dare they.

Catena will traditionally also be run with Aigis and your choice of Helot (offense) Faint (defense) or Leigh (recovery+support.) Early on, most people will usually recommend splashing aequor units to fill the gaps.
Oh, can you run her with her old self? I would have thought that not possible.
Ramona and GRamona cannot be run together, but there is no restriction on any other unit in that way.
Helot and GHelot actually fight... a lot. They exist in tandem, not as alternates.
Interesting. No spoilers though! I'm only on Ch. 4.

Helot is styled as a DPS originally, and has people who will swear by the Shattering Strike that pierces the heavens, but she kind of gets outclassed. Since Helot's exalt increases all strike damage by +100%, and Bloodthirsty Flail is a strike...
Good things happen.

Other units for later on, after your account is more established, include Horla or Arachne for GHelot teams. They replace the fourth flex slot. I am looking forward to a world where I replace ~~that bitch~~ Thais. Since GHelot has to work very hard to kill her enemies the first time or else face the terrible consequence of having to set up a second time, she usually gets into Ultra comps later on to improve her damage in new and unique ways.
At that stage, if you pull a copy of Mouchette and somehow tire of watching GHelot flail all over the place, they use literally the same teams bullet for bullet, so... you can use Mouchette instead.
Is she the collab girl?
Not Saya.
my oddly informative meme on the subject
more details are probably not needed
Haha. I will keep an eye out for her.
Let me post my updated account.
What would you reccomend for Ghelot out of these? Thais, Ghelot, and Horla?
Yep.
GHelot, Thais, you will super want to level Aigis even if she's not used specifically for this, either Horla or Celeste
Celeste gives you a little more wiggle room on your arithmetica expenditures and lets you play a little more risky with your death resist -- she doesn't heal as much as Catena does to start with
I do like Celeste. She was my starter.

Most of the characters in the game are not weak in their specific area of expertise. Counter characters kind of suffer from the fact that they are dependent on the enemy hitting them, and therefore don't work against enemies that do not hit them, but they're kind of a oneoff in that way. The worst character in your box is probably Uvhash, and people still succeed with Uvhash really well.
Uvhash is grody.
Really cool heart design though.
The number one most consistent trait with players who succeed in this game appears to be mental illness, not a particularly powerful understanding or expression of skill. So do whatever you want.
4 lv. 1's. Let's go.
I think I've seen an A5 clear where someone had one lv90 and three lv1s
There's multiple Mouchette clears like that
Amateurs.
1 whale mouch and 3 lvl 1s with no wheels
as it turns out? surprisingly simple to do
Mouchette is just like that.
there was also horse tide when you could play 4 lvl 1s into w1
What's a w1?
As previously mentioned. Number one consistent trait. Mental illness.
different stages of d-tide (endgame)
D-Zone is a once-per-two-weeks timed thing where you are given five stages to clear, which requires five separate teams of characters and WoDs.
I see. I see.
errr it was more like a veeeery exploitable mechanic but ok
Yeah and you'd have to be fucking insane or winning *the fuck* out of an internet argument to deliberately walk into W1 with four level ones just because you could
~~type of shit Angbak would do~~
nonono you don't understand, that particular wave was so cheesable everyone was doing it
D-Zone ends up being split into five waves (W1-W5) and five difficulties (A1-A5) with A5 being the highest difficulty, and it starts around lv40
~~dude I probably did it tbh I just don't remember~~
I could probably start an A1 1 r 2 times. I'll have to see.
and they never dared to make the horse a dtide boss again XD
It is getting late for me though.
Have fun sleeping
O/ Good luck with your insanity.

GHelot stomp comp

Mouchette team 2 (borrow someone like Angbak's Mouchette, and use Tinct, Winkle, Erica)

this much better for wave 3 onwards?GHelot stomp comp
Mouchette team 1 (let's say Horla, Ramona, Ogier) 
Mouchette team 2
what is sf0?
Soulforge talent

Runs from 0-10; 5 is when it starts asking for the higher tier mats, so you can consider a unit "minimally" invested when they're level 60, have 3 in their non-exalt skills and 5 in their Soulforge talent
at least, that's generally what I'm expecting from a box where most of the characters are lv60 but none of them are lv62+
does sf work on dtide?
Soulforge talent affects the characters stats dramatically in Astral Reign, which governs Arc 2, D-Zone, and any event where you spend your keyflare to rouse
ahhhh
also a lot of units get unique passives out of it, so you *definitely, absolutely* want at least one rank
i got atleast 300 dream shards who should i incrase sf 1st?
Goliath, Faros, Miryam, Tulu, and Fauxborn Murphy have their Lemurian faction passive tied to it, which comes in at full strength at Soulforge 1, although they're the most dramatic example

You should boost the Soulforge of all DPS units and anyone who has something that significantly scales from their raw stats; GHelot, Mouchette, Nymphaea, Saya, at least one rank for Goliath and Miryam
anyone you want to rouse is also an important Soulforge target, since you get a refund on your keyflare when you rouse, which makes Miryam's more important, because her rouse is Very Good™

it is easier to list who it is NOT important for: Celeste's CON is poor and she is mostly there to give you arithmetica or trigger tentacle attacks, so she can be ignored. Tinct and Winkle are level one, so their stats are irrelevant. Horla's stats are also not incredible.
i followed what u said GHelot, Mouchette, Nymphaea, Saya, at least one rank for Goliath and Miryam at least 5 and 1 for each goliath and miryam
got 78 more
Should make things a lot easier for you that way
Hold onto the rest of those, I think
if you have problems from not having enough stats, you could spend as many as you have, but you'll also need them for ranks beyond 5
You get Dreamsparks from the D-Jewel store, and you need both the sparks and the shards later

Celeste and Murphy are good at covering that base, so as long as Faros can tutor her own poison on tentacle slap, Nymphaea's 3 cost being high isn't as much of a problem

oh damn im so wrong what i mean for this question"what level should i be trying this 40 or 50" is what level should i be doing the waves

What level should your account be? Doesn't matter, scales to your average team level.
What level wave should you be fighting? Alert 3, minimum, regardless of printed level. Average level is more of a guideline than an actual requirement. 
What level should you start doing D-Zone? Like twenty levels ago.
I'm probably misunderstanding the question so I'll just answer all the options
Alert 3 is the middle option, I believe it goes from level 60 to level 68

Hey all, I'm currently stuck against the Murphy baby boss at chapter 6. I think it's just skill issue but anyone got some tips on rocking Ghelot x Tawil play? Because I heard these two are top tier right now

Kinda sucks because I got pretty lucky getting Tawil this high Enlighten
What would you recommend to help clear the baby Cthulhu boss tho? I really want to progress the story but damn that thing is a tank and keep dealing damage by tentacle every turn

So my usual build would be Tawil, Ghelot, Thais, Ogier

The idea is to spam Ghelot crimson shackles (that's why I thought Tawil copy works because she would also do her own Crimson)
And when it turned into the 4 cost card I'd copy it with Thais Exalt 

Ogier just there for survival and but of strength. Although not near enough to win the chapter boss
leveling your skills etc should also help already

Any tips or advice on this team I've put together? I want to try to use Ryker as a support with Vortice, since it seems like she *really* wants to crit, but I haven't the faintest idea who else to put on the team.
Any doc w team build help?
Like preset teams tgatre common
eh, vortice can just build her own crit tbh, what she mainly wants from supports is survivability so she can safely sit there and spam pursuits
